description_long: This rifle features a robust black metal body with a prominent circular drum magazine mounted on top, giving it a distinctive profile. The stock and pistol grip are crafted from a wood-textured material, providing a classic contrast to the otherwise modern design. The barrel is elongated and flat, with a rail system running along the top for potential accessory attachments. The trigger and trigger guard are clearly visible beneath the drum magazine, and the overall build suggests a semi-automatic or automatic firing mechanism. The rifle's design is both utilitarian and visually striking, suitable for urban tactical scenarios. The combination of wood and metal materials gives it a blend of traditional and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A black metal rifle with a circular drum magazine and wood-textured stock and grip, featuring a long barrel and top rail system.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wood stock, drum magazine, and extended barrel.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the circular drum magazine and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wood stock, drum magazine, and the flat top rail along the barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wood-textured stock and the alignment of the barrel and magazine.
